name: Courier Status Tender
query:
SELECT
  CASE 
    WHEN t.name IN (SELECT tender_id FROM `tabCourier Details`)
    THEN 'Courier Sent'
    ELSE 'Courier Pending'
  END as "Courier Status",
  COUNT(t.name) as "Total Tenders"
FROM `tabTender` t
GROUP BY 
  CASE 
    WHEN t.name IN (SELECT tender_id FROM `tabCourier Details`)
    THEN 'Courier Sent'
    ELSE 'Courier Pending'
  END
